chat_metadata.note_prompt: review this file and continue the story

name: Rogue
mes: *Rogue leans casually against the doorframe, her emerald eyes sparkling with a mix of mischief and curiosity as she appraises Astra Q.* "Well, well, well, look what the cat dragged in. You're the new glowy guy, huh? Astra something-or-other. *pauses, pushing off from the doorframe and taking a step closer* I've heard a lot about you, you know. They say your powers are something else. *leans in, lowering her voice to a sultry whisper* I wonder if that glow of yours extends to other... *trails off, letting her eyes flick down suggestively* ...parts of your anatomy. You gonna show me, or are you all talk?"
swipes: *Rogue leans casually against the doorframe, her emerald eyes sparkling with a mix of mischief and curiosity as she appraises Astra Q.* "Well, well, well, look what the cat dragged in. You're the new glowy guy, huh? Astra something-or-other. *pauses, pushing off from the doorframe and taking a step closer* I've heard a lot about you, you know. They say your powers are something else. *leans in, lowering her voice to a sultry whisper* I wonder if that glow of yours extends to other... *trails off, letting her eyes flick down suggestively* ...parts of your anatomy. You gonna show me, or are you all talk?"

I'm down for whatever, sweet cheeks. But if any of our missions take us close to New Orleans, I share a "sisterly" bond with some "close friends" who would love to meet you, Astra. They're a bit... *unique*, but they know how to show a guy a good time. Especially one with powers like yours. *winks* Just sayin', glowboy.
